data.title: XMR: Peter Brandt Flags Long-Term Pattern Resembling Silver’s Historic Breakout
data.description:

source: https://www.ethnews.com/xmr-peter-brandt-flags-long-term-pattern-resembling-silvers-historic-breakout/

data.title: Billionaire Michael Saylor’s Strategy Scoops 13,627 Bitcoin for $1.25B
data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/billionaire-michael-saylors-strategy-scoops-13627-bitcoin-for-1-25b/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 92,000 USDT with a 1.11% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 12, 2026, 16:29 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 92,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 92,058.007813 USDT, with a narrowed 1.11% increase in 24 hours.
